title: OpenSet Workout Execution
description: Execution layer for OpenSet: records what was done for a workout instance (session + set-level actuals). Use alongside prescription documents; reconstruct full workout from session + set records.

execution_id.description: Unique id for this workout session (e.g. UUID)

workout_ref.description: Reference to the prescribed workout or program slot

set_executions.description: One record per prescribed set (or per lap/interval for cardio)

summary.description: Optional high-level summary for dashboards without reading set data

feedback.description: Overall workout feedback (e.g. how the session felt, notes from the athlete or coach)

media.description: Photos or videos for the entire session

exercise_feedback.description: Feedback per exercise (e.g. how that exercise felt overall); optional media per exercise

source.description: Optional provenance: where this execution data came from (e.g. FIT import, manual entry). Use for deduplication, audit, and linking back to the original activity.

provider.description: Source type: e.g. manual, fit, garmin_connect, strava

activity_id.description: When from FIT/device: source activity or file id (for deduplication and re-import)

imported_at.description: When the data was imported or synced

device.description: Optional device or app name (e.g. Garmin Forerunner 965)

mapping_summary.description: Optional summary of what was mapped (e.g. Session→envelope, 3 Laps→set_executions)

x_extensions.description: Declared extension namespaces used in this document

WorkoutRef.description: Reference to the prescribed workout (standalone or within a program)

workout_id.description: Id of the workout document or library workout

program_id.description: If from a program, program document id

SetRef.description: Path to a prescribed set (array indices)

DimensionResult.description: Actual value and completion for one dimension

unit.description: Same unit semantics as prescription (kg, s, km, bpm, W, etc.)

completion.description: Whether the prescribed target was met, partially met, missed, or not logged

status.description: skipped = not attempted; partial/completed derived from dimension completions

dimensions.description: Actual values per dimension (dimensions prescribed for this set; RPE may also be included here when comparing to prescribed RPE)

rpe.description: Optional: client's felt RPE for this set (rate of perceived exertion). Can be logged even when RPE was not prescribed — captures 'real feel' from the client. When RPE is prescribed, you may use this field and/or dimensions.rpe (with completion).

rest_actual.description: Actual rest taken after the set in seconds

exercise_id.description: Exercise id from prescription (same as exercise_id on the prescribed exercise). Strongly recommended whenever the exercise comes from a library so analytics can show trends by exercise over time; omit only for custom/ad-hoc exercises that have no exercise_id in the prescription.

feedback.description: Per-set feedback (e.g. how that set felt, form notes, coach comments)

media.description: Photos or videos from this set (e.g. form check on first or last set of exercise)

url.description: URL or reference to the photo or video

label.description: Optional short label (e.g. Set 3 form check)

media.description: Optional photos/videos for this exercise (e.g. video of last set)
